raw_consumer_statement:
My credit report ( XXXX  and XXXX  ) shows a Citi Secured Card with a charged-off balance of {$130.00}. I am attempting to pay this debt in full immediately. 

I called Citi Customer Service ( XXXX ) on XX/XX/year>, to make this payment. The automated system stated it could not find an account under my SSN. When I reached a human representative, they also failed to locate the account manually and transferred me to a dispute department that could not help. 

I am trying to resolve this debt, but Citis internal systems can not find the account that Citi is actively reporting to my credit bureaus.
